description_long: This excavator features a robust yellow steel body with black and yellow hazard striping on the articulated boom. The operator cab is enclosed with dark-tinted windows and is positioned on the left side of the upper structure, providing visibility and protection. The undercarriage consists of wide, black steel tracks designed for stability and traction on rough terrain. The boom is equipped with a standard digging bucket, ideal for earthmoving and construction tasks. Visible details include hydraulic pistons, handrails, and access steps, as well as a small antenna and exhaust pipe on the cab roof. The asset displays realistic wear, with some surface grime and subtle metallic reflections, and a logo decal is visible on the side.
description: A yellow steel excavator with a hazard-striped articulated boom, black tracks, and an enclosed operator cab on the left side. It features a standard digging bucket and realistic construction details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bucket, boom, and the cab's protective glass, with tracks extending backward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the cab, hazard-striped boom, and the full length of the tracks.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the counterweight, engine compartment, and the width of the tracks.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the boom's articulation, hydraulic pistons, and the bucket's profile.
